Objective: Confirm relevant actors missions exchanges and outcomes
Required Data: Stakeholder workshops process documents and domain literature
Success Criterion: No material stakeholder or mission omission under review
Failure Response: Revise boundary constructs and exchange map
Claim Permitted: The model has stakeholder-reviewed conceptual scope

Required Data: Test fixtures invariants and reproducible configurations
Success Criterion: All declared accounting constraint and audit tests pass
Failure Response: Fix implementation and rerun full regression suite
Claim Permitted: The code correctly executes encoded rules

Objective: Confirm expected behavior in controlled cases
Required Data: Designed scenarios with known qualitative or quantitative responses
Success Criterion: Direction bounds and conservation behavior match prespecification
Failure Response: Diagnose equations parameters or test design
Claim Permitted: The model is experimentally viable under synthetic conditions

Required Data: Time-aligned demand capacity resource cost outcome and response data
Success Criterion: Prespecified holdout error and uncertainty targets are met
Failure Response: Revise model class collect data or narrow intended use
Claim Permitted: The twin is calibrated for the historical setting and period
Governance Approval: Data owner ethics oversight and research lead

Objective: Test live predictions without operational influence
Required Data: Streaming observations plus frozen twin predictions
Success Criterion: Drift forecast fairness and acceptance calibration remain within limits
Failure Response: Suspend update investigate drift and rollback model version
Claim Permitted: The twin has prospective predictive validity for the tested context

Objective: Evaluate recommendations with human approval veto and rollback
Required Data: Shadow evidence intervention logs responses outcomes and adverse events
Success Criterion: Primary outcome improves or remains acceptable with no safety/autonomy breach
Failure Response: Stop pilot restore prior policy and conduct incident review
Claim Permitted: Limited field effectiveness under governed pilot conditions
Governance Approval: Ethics/governance board and affected stakeholder representatives

Objective: Maintain synchronized useful and governable twin
Required Data: Continuous data quality residual safety fairness and outcome monitoring
Success Criterion: Sustained criteria plus successful periodic revalidation
Failure Response: Automatic safe mode rollback and model review
Claim Permitted: Context-bounded operational validity while monitoring remains active
Governance Approval: Accountable system owner and standing governance body
